subagent_chain.summary: Selected source-only demo_mutation_envelope_v1 contract plus pure mlde_demo_applier record mapping; bandit runtime remains blocked.
Implemented stdlib-only demo_mutation_envelope_v1 builder, hash, validator, extractor, countability gates, and focused tests.
Implemented pure applier mapping helper and minimally attached envelopes to _record_application payloads without changing SQL/status/IPC semantics.
Found countable envelopes could pass without a concrete max-delta bound and authority/scope scanners missed secretAccess/mainnetAccess/candidateScope/candidateEngineMode aliases.
Required concrete finite nonnegative max_delta or max_delta_pct for countability and hardened authority/scope alias detection.
Confirmed both HIGH findings closed and no new blocker introduced.
Regression passed: py_compile, envelope/mapping 49, mlde_demo_applier 31, adjacent contract 76, forbidden scan, and diff-check.
Accepted source-only WP5 with no blocking findings; residuals are no runtime/deployed E2E, DB verification, IPC execution, or live proof.
